titleStmt.title: SII 24.221: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 221. (A.R. No. 149 of 1938-39.) SOUTH WALL OF THE CHAKRATTĀḺVĀR SHRINE.

summary.p: Registers the confirmation by the king of the tax-free grant of the village Chittiravalli alias Kēraḷa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Kōṭṭaikarai-nāḍu, made by his father (Ayyaṉ) Kulaśēkhara, for the expenses of conducting the service called Kulaśēkhara-sandi instituted in his name in the shrine of Tiruvāḻi-Āḻvār. Quotes the 21st year and 290th day of the king's reign. Kōṉēriṉmaikoṇḍāṉ of the record may be identified with Jaṭāvarmaṉ Vīra-Pāṇḍya, a half-brother of Jaṭāvarmaṉ Sundara Pāṇḍya II. Ayyaṉ Kulaśēkhara evidently refers to Māṟavarmaṉ Kulaśēkhara I.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tribhuvaṉacakravatti koṉeriṉmai koṇṭāṉ nāyaṉār tiruvāḻi Āḻvār
koyilt tiruppati śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷukku . taṅkaḷ koyil nāyaṉār tiruvāḻi Āḻvāṟku
Ayyan tirunāmattāl Ayyaṉ kaṇṭaruḷiṉa kulacekaraṉ cantikku Amutupaṭi cāttu
ppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa nitta nimantaṅkaḷukkum tiruppaṇikkum koṭṭaikkarai nāṭṭuc
cittiravalliyāṉa keraḷa caturuvetimaṅkalattu nāṉkellai Uḷḷiṭṭa naṉ
cey puṉcey nattam nirnilai kuḷamum kuḷappāḻum Uḷḷiṭṭa nilaṅkaḷum In
nilattu varuṅkaṭamai kuṭimai Antarāyam poṉvari Iṉavari
Īḻam poṉ cey cekkiṟai taṟi Iṟai taṭṭoli taṭṭārppāṭṭam
Oḻukku nirppāṭṭam Uḷḷiṭṭa Āyavaṟkamum Uṭpaṭa pala viṉiyokam
Ilāñcaṉai viṉiyokam kāttikaip paccai cantatippaccai Uḷḷiṭṭa
aṉaittupātikaḷum Uṭpaṭa Ayyaṉ tirumukappaṭiyile nāmum
tantu Ippaṭikku variyilār kaṇakkiluṅ kaḻikkac coṉṉom . Ippaṭik
ku cantrādityavat cella kallilum cempilum veṭṭi nāṉkel
laiyum tiruvāḻik kallu nāṭṭik koḷka . Ivai Olaimaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ
Eḻuttu . yāṇṭu 2 10 1 nāḷ 2 100 9 10 . Ivai villavarāyar Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 24.221 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
